name: Select
description_short: This is not a consumer finance company. The website documents HTML's <select> element for web developers.
description_long: CRITICAL ISSUE: The provided URL (https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Reference/Elements/select) does not belong to a company called "Select." This is the Mozilla Developer Network (MDN) documentation page explaining the HTML <select> element—a programming tool for creating dropdown menus in web forms. The page contains zero information about financial services, lending, credit, payday alternatives, or any consumer finance products. There is no company profile, no services, no leadership team, and no business model related to finance. The categorization of this as a "payday-alternatives" company appears to be a data entry error. This is purely technical documentation written for software developers, not a business profile suitable for CreditDoc's database. Creating a consumer finance profile from this content would be entirely fabricated and misleading.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)
pros: Not-for-profit — typically lower fees and better rates than banks
NCUA insured — deposits protected up to $250,000
Low-income designated — may offer Payday Alternative Loans (PALs)
cons: Not a financial services company—this is HTML documentation
